title: NodeCard
description: The compact, canonical card every graph node carries — what gets embedded and what the LLM reads when deciding 'same or new'. See docs/02-technical-approach.md §6.4.

id.description: Stable, never-reused, human-readable slug. Format '<prefix>.<kebab>' e.g. 'appr.discount-over-10pct'.

type.description: Fixed enum from the ontology node_types.

aliases.description: The dedup superpower — different employees name the same thing differently; aliases collapse them onto one node.

category_codes.description: Many-to-many governed tags from the taxonomy registry. Must already exist in contracts/ontology.json (a new code goes to the pending-taxonomy queue).

provenance.description: Every fact traces to who said it and when; status only rises with evidence.
